question: For the quarterly platform engagement distribution, which statement is supported by the 100% stacked bar chart?

options.A: Q3 has the highest number of support tickets among all quarters.
options.B: The chart shows overall engagement volume increasing steadily from Q1 to Q4.
options.C: Support tickets account for a larger percentage than page views in every quarter.
options.D: User registrations and support tickets can be summed to measure total platform usage in each quarter.

explanation: 100% stacking normalizes unrelated categories to 100% within each quarter. Valid inferences include within-quarter ranking (e.g., one metric > another in every quarter). Invalid inferences include cross-quarter total comparisons or combining unrelated categories.
